title: Crayon Markdown frontmatter
description: YAML frontmatter at the top of every Crayon-managed .md file. Key order is fixed (title, subtitle, crayon) per the Canonical Markdown profile in docs/repo-layout.md.

title.description: Maps to the Doc/tab TITLE paragraph style. The document's single top-level title (not an H1).

subtitle.description: Optional. Maps to the SUBTITLE paragraph style.

docId.description: Google Doc id backing this file.

tabId.description: Present only when this .md is a tab within a tabbed Doc; identifies which tab.
